name: libnode137
title: libnode137
summary: evented I/O for V8 javascript - runtime library
description:
evented I/O for V8 javascript - runtime library
Node.js is a platform built on Chrome's JavaScript runtime for easily
building fast, scalable network applications. Node.js uses an
event-driven, non-blocking I/O model that makes it lightweight and
efficient, perfect for data-intensive real-time applications that run
across distributed devices.
.
Node.js is bundled with several useful libraries to handle server
tasks:
.
System, Events, Standard I/O, Modules, Timers, Child Processes, POSIX,
HTTP, Multipart Parsing, TCP, DNS, Assert, Path, URL, Query Strings.
.
This package provides the dynamic library for Node.js.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnode137 because evented I/O for V8 javascript - runtime library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnode137 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnode137 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnode137 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
